data.title: Swiss Financial Institutions Launch Sandbox for Swiss Franc Stablecoin
data.description: Seven Swiss financial institutions have initiated a live sandbox for a regulated Swiss franc stablecoin, which will operate until 2026. According to NS3.AI, Sygnum announced that this controlled environment employs transaction limits and a restricted participant pool to test digital financial products under realistic conditions. The participants aim to develop operational expertise in blockchain-based payments and foster a Swiss digital money ecosystem.

data.title: Gate launched TradFi copy trading, with daily trading volume exceeding $1.2 billion.
data.description: Official data shows that Gate TradFi copy trading has seen a rapid increase in trading activity since its launch, with daily trading volume exceeding $1.2 billion. This feature allows users to proportionally replicate lead traders' strategies in CFD markets such as gold, forex, indices, commodities, and popular stocks, enabling more convenient trading of traditional financial assets and strategy following. Gate pioneered TradFi copy trading, adopting a maximum profit-sharing ratio of 20% and introducing a High Water Mark (HWM) mechanism, distributing profits only after the strategy's net asset value (NAV) reaches an all-time high, improving the fairness and transparency of profit distribution. Simultaneously, the system supports proportional copy trading based on total NAV, partial position closure synchronization, and stop-loss settings, and provides multi-dimensional indicators such as return and drawdown to help users more efficiently select strategies and manage risk. Gate has launched an initial incentive program totaling 88,000 USDT. Lead traders can earn rewards based on their onboarding, trading activity, and trading volume rankings, with top performers potentially sharing up to 15,500 USDT. Copy traders can also earn incentives by completing their first trade or participating in multi-trader copy trading. By continuously improving the TradFi trading ecosystem, Gate is further enhancing the multi-asset trading experience and creating a more professional one-stop trading platform for global users.

data.title: Bitcoin's Long-Term Holders Retain 21% of Total Supply
data.description: According to data released by Bitcoin Archive, 21% of Bitcoin's total supply is currently held by long-term holders. According to Foresight News, this statistic highlights the significant portion of Bitcoin that is being retained by investors with a long-term perspective.

data.title: Iran's Military Advisor Issues Warning on National Interests
data.description: On April 8, Iran's Supreme Leader's military advisor, Mohsen Rezaei, issued a statement on social media emphasizing that the armed forces remain on high alert until the nation's interests are fully secured. According to BlockBeats, Rezaei's comments highlight the ongoing tension and the readiness of Iran's military to act if necessary.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | LBMA Adds Metale Precious Metals Hong Kong Ltd. to Silver Delivery List
data.description: The London Bullion Market Association (LBMA) has announced that, effective from April 8, 2026, Metale Precious Metals Hong Kong Ltd. will be included in its Good Delivery List for silver. According to Jin10, this inclusion signifies that the company meets the LBMA's stringent standards for silver delivery. The Good Delivery List is a globally recognized benchmark for the quality and reliability of bullion bars, and being listed is a mark of excellence in the precious metals industry. This development is expected to enhance Metale Precious Metals Hong Kong Ltd.'s reputation and credibility in the market.

data.title: The Federal Reserve will release the minutes of its March monetary policy meeting at 2:00 AM on April 9.
data.description: The Federal Reserve will release the minutes of its March monetary policy meeting at 2:00 AM Beijing time on April 9th. This document, produced against the backdrop of escalating conflict in the Middle East and an increasingly complex market environment, will reveal how Fed officials assessed supply shocks and inflationary pressures, as well as their framework for judging the balance of risks. (Jinshi)

data.title: Morgan Stanley Strategist Highlights Potential U.S. Equities Reversal
data.description: Morgan Stanley strategist Mike Wilson has indicated that a sustainable bottom in U.S. equities may require further de-risking in crowded trades. According to NS3.AI, Wilson noted that the S&P 500 recently rebounded from the 6,300–6,500 support range. He suggested that the index might revisit this range if interest rates increase or geopolitical tensions intensify, although he does not foresee a significant breakdown. Wilson identified financials, consumer discretionary, industrials, and hyperscalers as sectors with potential for a reversal.

data.title: Launch of AgentPay Aims to Solve AI Payment Interoperability
data.description: Alchemy has introduced AgentPay, a new tool designed to enhance AI payment systems by tackling interoperability challenges. According to NS3.AI, this product offers a unified platform to manage various agent-based payment protocols, streamlining operations and improving efficiency in AI-driven financial transactions.

data.title: Turkey Engages Italy in Talks for European Missile-Defense Systems
data.description: Turkey is currently in discussions with Italy regarding the purchase and co-production of European-made missile-defense systems. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the strategic move as part of Turkey's efforts to enhance its defense capabilities. The negotiations are focused on acquiring advanced technology to bolster Turkey's military infrastructure. This development comes amid Turkey's ongoing initiatives to strengthen its defense sector through international collaborations. The potential deal with Italy signifies a significant step in Turkey's defense strategy, aiming to integrate European technology into its military arsenal.

data.title: Federal Reserve to Release March Monetary Policy Meeting Minutes Amid Middle East Tensions
data.description: The Federal Reserve is set to release the minutes of its March monetary policy meeting tonight at 2 a.m. UTC+8. According to Jin10, this document, crafted against the backdrop of escalating Middle East conflicts and increasingly complex market conditions, will provide insights into how Federal Reserve officials assess supply shocks and inflation pressures. It will also reveal their framework for judging risk balance. Investors are advised to pay close attention to the details disclosed in the minutes.

data.title: Shiba Inu Rises 4.6% Amid US-Iran Ceasefire
data.description: Shiba Inu's value increased by 4.6% in the past 24 hours following the announcement of a two-week ceasefire agreement between the United States and Iran. According to NS3.AI, this development has sparked discussions about the potential for Shiba Inu to move back above the $0.00001 mark. However, achieving this milestone may rely on Bitcoin surpassing the $72,000–$73,000 resistance level and the ceasefire remaining in effect.

data.title: Eurozone February PPI Declines by 0.7%
data.description: The Eurozone's Producer Price Index (PPI) for February decreased by 0.7%, meeting expectations, according to Jin10. The previous month's figure was revised from 0.70% to 0.8%.

data.title: Eurozone February Retail Sales Growth Revised to 2.1%
data.description: Eurozone retail sales for February showed a year-on-year growth rate of 1.7%, matching expectations, according to Jin10. The previous value was revised from 2.00% to 2.1%, indicating a slight upward adjustment in the retail sector's performance for the month.

data.title: A whale deposited $7.86 million into Hyperliquid and purchased 200,000 HYPE tokens.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale deposited $7.86 million into Hyperliquid and bought 200,042 HYPE tokens at a price of $39.29 per coin.

data.title: Crude Oil Decline: Trader Profits $2 Million from Short Position
data.description: A trader known as Loracle successfully closed a $5 million short position on crude oil perpetual contracts, securing a $2 million profit. According to NS3.AI, this move came after crude oil prices dropped over 15%, falling below $100 per barrel early Wednesday. Arkham Intelligence identified the trade as being executed on Hyperliquid, where the volume for WTI crude oil perpetuals reached $2.45 billion in the past 24 hours.

data.title: Whale Invests $7.86 Million in HyperLiquid for HYPE Tokens
data.description: A significant transaction was observed on April 8, as a whale deposited $7.86 million into HyperLiquid. According to BlockBeats, the funds were used to purchase approximately 200,000 HYPE tokens at an average price of $39.29 each.

data.title: Ethereum Plans Quantum-Safe Transition by 2029 Amid Potential Threats
data.description: Ethereum is preparing for a quantum-safe transition by 2029, acknowledging the potential risks posed by quantum computers. According to NS3.AI, while the threat from quantum technology is considered real, it is not seen as immediate. The transition is described as a multiyear network upgrade, aimed at protecting private keys and securing billions of dollars from future quantum advancements.

data.title: China's National Energy Administration Emphasizes Renewable Energy Development
data.description:
On March 31, the National Energy Administration of China held a monthly meeting to discuss the development and construction of renewable energy power for March. According to Jin10, the meeting highlighted the importance of several key tasks for the year, marking the beginning of the 'Fifteenth Five-Year Plan.'

Firstly, the administration stressed the need to continue efforts in expanding investment in renewable energy. Secondly, it emphasized the importance of coordinated efforts in the consumption of new energy. Local energy authorities are urged to balance external and local new energy development, strengthen the fulfillment of long-term power purchase agreements, and stabilize expectations for new energy consumption. Power grid companies are encouraged to increase grid investment and optimize dispatch management to enhance new energy consumption capacity. Power generation companies are advised to make rational judgments and plan project layouts reasonably.

Thirdly, the administration called for the promotion of new models and business formats tailored to local conditions. Local energy authorities should explore new models such as direct green electricity connections and zero-carbon parks, expanding the non-electric consumption space for new energy.

Lastly, the administration highlighted the need for both internal and external improvements to enhance the market competitiveness of new energy companies. It noted that comprehensive participation in market transactions by new energy companies is an inevitable trend.

data.title: A suspected insider, using a Polymarket wallet cluster, profited $600,000 by betting on a US-Iran ceasefire.
data.description: A Polymarket wallet cluster profited $600,000 by betting on a US-Iran ceasefire. This cluster is linked to a wider network of suspected insiders who trade geopolitical events with unusual accuracy. These accounts are connected to a larger cluster that previously profited approximately $1.2 million by betting on a US strike against Iran. They typically use wallets with newly deposited funds to place "YES" bets on specific dates like February 28th, hours before the event, and accurately predicted events such as attacks on Iranian nuclear facilities, Israeli strikes against Iran, and US strikes against Iran. (SolanaFloor)

data.title: Bitget Launchpool will soon launch the project Midnight (NIGHT), with a total prize pool of 12,000,000 NIGHT tokens.
data.description: Bitget Launchpool will soon launch the Midnight (NIGHT) project, with a total prize pool of 12,000,000 NIGHT tokens. The staking period is from April 9th, 19:00 to April 16th, 19:00 (UTC+8). This Launchpool round includes two staking pools: BGB Staking Pool: Total airdrop amount: 11,250,000 NIGHT tokens; NIGHT VIP user staking limit: 50,000; BGB regular user staking limit: 5,000; BGBNIGHT Staking Pool: Total airdrop amount: 750,000; NIGHT individual staking limit: 10,000,000 NIGHT tokens.
